item.title: This Squirrel Seal Is Linked To An Iconic Brand
item.description: Discover the story of a squirrel seal and its connection to an iconic brand, exploring its history, design, and lasting influence. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

media:content.media:title: This Squirrel Seal Is Linked To An Iconic Brand
media:content.media:description: Discover the story of a squirrel seal and its connection to an iconic brand, exploring its history, design, and lasting influence. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

item.title: I Found A Ring That's Nothing Like The Rings I'm Used To Finding!
item.description: Discover a unique ring found during a treasure hunt, exploring its unusual design, history, and what makes it stand out from typical finds. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

media:content.media:title: I Found A Ring That's Nothing Like The Rings I'm Used To Finding!
media:content.media:description: Discover a unique ring found during a treasure hunt, exploring its unusual design, history, and what makes it stand out from typical finds. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

item.title: Remarkable Finds on The Foreshore
item.description: Join a shoreline exploration uncovering remarkable finds, from hidden artifacts to forgotten treasures that reveal fascinating pieces of history. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

media:content.media:title: Remarkable Finds on The Foreshore
media:content.media:description: Join a shoreline exploration uncovering remarkable finds, from hidden artifacts to forgotten treasures that reveal fascinating pieces of history. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

item.title: Why Are 19th Century Poison Bottles Bright Blue
item.description: Discover why many 19th-century poison bottles were made bright blue, exploring the history, safety reasons, and design choices behind these striking containers. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

media:content.media:title: Why Are 19th Century Poison Bottles Bright Blue
media:content.media:description: Discover why many 19th-century poison bottles were made bright blue, exploring the history, safety reasons, and design choices behind these striking containers. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

item.title: The Thames Never Fails To Surprise Me
item.description: Join a mudlarking adventure along the River Thames, uncovering unexpected artifacts and hidden treasures that reveal fascinating stories from the past. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

media:content.media:title: The Thames Never Fails To Surprise Me
media:content.media:description: Join a mudlarking adventure along the River Thames, uncovering unexpected artifacts and hidden treasures that reveal fascinating stories from the past. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

item.title: I Found A Military Pocket Watch While Mudlarking!
item.description: While mudlarking along the riverbank, a historic military pocket watch is uncovered, offering a glimpse into the past and the stories behind lost artifacts. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

media:content.media:title: I Found A Military Pocket Watch While Mudlarking!
media:content.media:description: While mudlarking along the riverbank, a historic military pocket watch is uncovered, offering a glimpse into the past and the stories behind lost artifacts. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames
